message:
fix(security): fail closed on unsupported signature algorithm in direct verify_capsule_signature path

Extract signature metadata validation into a dedicated
validate_signature_metadata() helper and call it from
verify_capsule_signature() before extracting the signer public key.
Previously, direct callers of verify_capsule_signature() could bypass
the algorithm check — a capsule claiming "rsa" as its signature
algorithm would still pass if it carried a valid Ed25519 signature.

Add two regression tests: verify_capsule_signature and replay_capsule
both now reject wrong-algorithm capsules even with valid signatures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
